title: globimetula oreophila
intro: Globimetula oreophila, also known as the Madagascar globimetula, is a species of flowering plant in the family Globulariaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Globimetula oreophila are said to include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. It can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in combination with other herbs to create tonics and remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
